userRequest: I want to add an option to the interactive config wizard to create a new profile or edit an existing profile

decomposition.reasoning: The request involves extending an interactive config wizard with profile management (create/edit). I broke this into an analysis phase to understand the existing wizard/profile structure, a data-layer implementation for profile CRUD operations, a UI/flow implementation for the wizard menu additions, and finally review and test tasks. The analyze task must run first to inform implementation, and the two implementation tasks can potentially run in parallel once the structure is understood.

tasks.description: Analyze the existing interactive config wizard codebase: locate the wizard entry point, understand current menu/prompt structure, identify how configuration and profiles are currently stored and loaded (file format, schema, storage path), and document the extension points needed for adding create/edit profile flows.

scope.description: Entire config wizard and profile/configuration storage layer

tasks.description: Implement the profile data layer: add functions to create a new named profile (with default values), load an existing profile for editing, and persist profile changes back to the config store. Ensure profiles are stored in a structured, conflict-safe way (e.g. keyed by profile name). Handle validation errors (duplicate names, missing required fields).

scope.description: Config/profile storage model and CRUD utilities

tasks.description: Extend the interactive config wizard to add two new top-level menu options: 'Create new profile' and 'Edit existing profile'. For create: prompt for a profile name, then walk through each config field with defaults. For edit: present a list of existing profiles to select, then allow field-by-field editing with current values pre-filled. Wire both flows to the profile data layer from task-2.

scope.description: Interactive wizard prompts and menu flow

tasks.description: Write unit and integration tests for the new profile wizard flows: test creating a profile with valid and invalid inputs, editing an existing profile (field updates persisted correctly), selecting from a list of profiles, and cancellation/back navigation. Mock the storage layer to isolate wizard logic.

scope.description: Test suite for profile creation and editing wizard flows

tasks.description: Review the full implementation: verify the wizard UX is consistent with the existing prompt style, check that profile validation logic is robust, ensure no regressions to existing wizard options, confirm error messages are user-friendly, and assess edge cases (empty profile list on edit, name collisions on create).

scope.description: End-to-end review of wizard UI, data layer, and test coverage

lastError: Cancelled by user from interactive session
